The "'''technobeast Jedi'''" was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who lived during a subset of the [[New Sith Wars]] called the [[Sictis Wars]].<ref name="SWCE-TECH" /> As a combatant in this conflict, the Jedi Knight became infected by the [[nanogene spore]], a virus capable of transforming living beings into [[Cyborg/Legends|part-machine, part-organic]] [[mutant]]s known as [[technobeast]]s. Through the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], he prevented the virus from [[Lobotomy|lobotomizing]] the frontal lobes of his [[Brain/Legends|brain]]. In the process, the Knight managed to preserve his own identity, becoming known as the "technobeast Jedi" and serving [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] under this new moniker.<ref name="NEGD" />
